replies.msg:
大概係有個啊婆埋去挑機
踢跌stand 同結他再報埋狗
狗反而鎖手足再坐24
宜家扣留埋所有嘢
希望大家入去支持下



I won't be silenced, because I stand for justice and I stand for the truth. Yes, I was arrested, but no, I am not a criminal. I would like to explain the story behind this photograph that has been spread around yesterday.

To start with, I was there minding my own business busking in the streets of Central, HK as usual when suddenly an old lady that works from the newspaper stand behind me decided to cause a commotion by scolding at me, grabbing away my microphone stand and giving my guitar case a kick, eventually leading me to drop my guitar onto the ground.

The irony is that it was the lady who was the one to call for the cops and to get them to abruptly come up to me, aggressively grab me by my left arm and drag me aside, and mouthed several sentences in Cantonese that I had not been able to understand at all. In the end, to my surprise, out of the both of us, I was the one to find myself getting handcuffed and immediately sent to the police station.

No voice memos, no video recordings, nothing, but it was already enough for the cops to arrest me for the suspicion of 'criminal intimidation' against the old lady.

As of now, I am released on bail. What bothers me is that after having had all of my belongings confiscated for inspection, they had not returned my guitar, amplifier and mic stand, which are essentials for my busking, for my living, which are not even in the slightest bit related to the alleged case.

Therefore, I believe I am now a victim of false accusation, where the arrest that had been orchestrated was an attempt by the Hong Kong Police Force to punish me for having the hard iron balls to stand my ground as a busker in their faces in the past several months as well as for my infamous street performances of the English version of the pro-democracy song 願榮光歸香港 #GlorytoHongKong since 24 October last year. In the name of freedom and artistic expression, I would like to ask everyone's help to spread word on this issue.


https://www.facebook.com/302843289876447/posts/1592754980885265/?d=n

唔該大家唔好再推啦呢條友係人渣

Oliver哥玩夠未啊，大家都係busker點解要做到你咁低莊？大家認清楚佢，佢唔撚係手足

佢次次唱榮光都擺個錢箱出黎，次次都好多和理非入錢，所有其他黃既buskers唱榮光都唔撚會擺錢箱出黎㗎，佢食人血饅頭咋

就算唔講佢係咪手足，以前未分黃藍嘅時候，佢已經會報狗，話其他busker阻街，趕走左佢哋之後五分鐘內自己霸左人地個靚位，通常係朗豪坊外，中環戲院里等等超多人既地方，大把busker俾佢報過狗

正仆街冚家剷，食屎啦Oliver Ma


樓主唔該pin我comment，大家要知道呢條友有幾撚賤thx

quote.msg:
大概係有個啊婆埋去挑機
踢跌stand 同結他再報埋狗
狗反而鎖手足再坐24
宜家扣留埋所有嘢
希望大家入去支持下



I won't be silenced, because I stand for justice and I stand for the truth. Yes, I was arrested, but no, I am not a criminal. I would like to explain the story behind this photograph that has been spread around yesterday.

To start with, I was there minding my own business busking in the streets of Central, HK as usual when suddenly an old lady that works from the newspaper stand behind me decided to cause a commotion by scolding at me, grabbing away my microphone stand and giving my guitar case a kick, eventually leading me to drop my guitar onto the ground.

The irony is that it was the lady who was the one to call for the cops and to get them to abruptly come up to me, aggressively grab me by my left arm and drag me aside, and mouthed several sentences in Cantonese that I had not been able to understand at all. In the end, to my surprise, out of the both of us, I was the one to find myself getting handcuffed and immediately sent to the police station.

No voice memos, no video recordings, nothing, but it was already enough for the cops to arrest me for the suspicion of 'criminal intimidation' against the old lady.

As of now, I am released on bail. What bothers me is that after having had all of my belongings confiscated for inspection, they had not returned my guitar, amplifier and mic stand, which are essentials for my busking, for my living, which are not even in the slightest bit related to the alleged case.

Therefore, I believe I am now a victim of false accusation, where the arrest that had been orchestrated was an attempt by the Hong Kong Police Force to punish me for having the hard iron balls to stand my ground as a busker in their faces in the past several months as well as for my infamous street performances of the English version of the pro-democracy song 願榮光歸香港 #GlorytoHongKong since 24 October last year. In the name of freedom and artistic expression, I would like to ask everyone's help to spread word on this issue.


https://www.facebook.com/302843289876447/posts/1592754980885265/?d=n

quote.msg:
唔該大家唔好再推啦呢條友係人渣

Oliver哥玩夠未啊，大家都係busker點解要做到你咁低莊？大家認清楚佢，佢唔撚係手足

佢次次唱榮光都擺個錢箱出黎，次次都好多和理非入錢，所有其他黃既buskers唱榮光都唔撚會擺錢箱出黎㗎，佢食人血饅頭咋

就算唔講佢係咪手足，以前未分黃藍嘅時候，佢已經會報狗，話其他busker阻街，趕走左佢哋之後五分鐘內自己霸左人地個靚位，通常係朗豪坊外，中環戲院里等等超多人既地方，大把busker俾佢報過狗

正仆街冚家剷，食屎啦Oliver Ma


樓主唔該pin我comment，大家要知道呢條友有幾撚賤thx

replies.msg:
啱，佢好撚醒
佢成撚日同娛樂行隊busking互屌
成鳩日報狗搞到人無得中環立足
佢對住同行都咁撚勇武抵你有今日
見有狗行過即刻唱願榮光搏狗圍佢谷人氣
倒數果日又一撚樣，班狗封撚晒上老蘭條路
佢仲擺晒檔阻撚住條行人路
班狗行過又即刻願榮光拎光環
然後收錢收到肥肥
死撚返去旺角彩虹唱啦屌你老母

利申：中環精英
